entries.title: Raging Craft
details: Updated rest of tournament quest/npcs
Plans for custom story are underway, will need to rework existing custom story so far.

entries.title: HexHub live feed online
entries.summary: Remote GitHub feed is now working.
details: This is the first live entry.
Future updates can be appended here.

entries.title: New Command: Rarity Evolve Test
entries.summary: You can now test evolved rarity styling directly from the rarity command.
details: Use /rarity evotest 1, /rarity evotest 2, or /rarity evotest 3 on the held item.
Aliases /rarity evo <tier> and /rarity evolved <tier> work the same way.
The test applies your evolved rarity color formatting and writes the evolved tier and boost lines for previewing.
<#ff007e>Commands work in a single player environment and not on server unless permissions have been granted.</#>

entries.title: New Feature: Tabbed News / Notes
entries.summary: The hub feed now supports local JSON and optional remote feed loading.
details: Edit config/hexcolorcodes/hub_feed.json to change these rows without rebuilding the mod.
If remoteUrl is set and reachable, the hub will try that feed first and fall back to the local entries.

entries.title: Maintenance: Hub shortcuts reorganized
entries.summary: Existing publish dates can stay fixed while new entries use TODAY.
details: Use a fixed date when you want a real publish date preserved on the row.
Use TODAY, LIVE, CURRENT, or a blank date field when you want the current day shown automatically.

entries.title: Activity: Join the Discord invite
entries.summary: Activities can still point at built-in actions like Discord.
details: This is a sample activity row using the built-in Discord action.
For a webhook-produced feed, point remoteUrl at a JSON endpoint rather than a Discord webhook URL directly.

entries.title: New Feature: Hex Help guide page
Notice: Item Info opens held-item data
Notice: Server Info opens getting started
Planned: Useless backport
entries.summary: Planned backport of selected older mod features and blocks.
details: This is a planned backport of selected content from older mods.
The focus is on blocks, items, utility features, and older mechanics rather than bringing biomes over.
This notice is meant as a roadmap-style preview of older content that may return in a cleaned-up 1.7.10-friendly form.

entries.title: Git Hub Live Readings
details: This was a live edit made about 9:22 PM, so it should show up and read from the GitHub.

details: Basically some items in the auction would print as a pseudo black common but be pearlescent or something
So that should be fixed persay, currently refreshing current story npcs and planing custom story.
